---
title: "Search Strategy Documentation"
subtitle: "CHW Interventions for Maternal Mental Health in LMICs"
date: "2026-03-02"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    self-contained: true
bibliography: references.bib
csl: ../apa.csl
---

# Search Strategy

## Research Question

**Framework:** PICO

| Element | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| **Population** | Pregnant and postpartum women (perinatal period) in low- and middle-income countries |
| **Intervention** | Community health worker (CHW) delivered mental health interventions |
| **Comparison** | Standard care, enhanced usual care, or no intervention |
| **Outcome** | Maternal depression and/or anxiety symptoms measured by validated scales |

## Concept Decomposition

| Concept | MeSH Terms | Free-Text Synonyms |
|---------|-----------|-------------------|
| Population | "Pregnant Women"[MeSH], "Postpartum Period"[MeSH], "Maternal Health"[MeSH] | maternal, perinatal, antenatal, prenatal, postnatal, postpartum, pregnancy, pregnant, mothers |
| Mental Health | "Depression, Postpartum"[MeSH], "Depressive Disorder"[MeSH], "Anxiety Disorders"[MeSH], "Mental Health"[MeSH] | depression, depressive, anxiety, mental health, psychological distress, perinatal depression, postnatal depression |
| CHW Intervention | "Community Health Workers"[MeSH], "Task Performance and Analysis"[MeSH] | community health worker*, CHW, lay health worker*, lay counselor*, peer supporter*, task-shifting, task-sharing, non-specialist, paraprofessional |
| LMICs | "Developing Countries"[MeSH] | low-income, middle-income, LMIC, developing countr*, resource-limited, low-resource |

## Database-Specific Strategies

### PubMed/MEDLINE

**Date searched:** 2026-03-02
**Results:** 487

```
("Pregnant Women"[MeSH] OR "Postpartum Period"[MeSH] OR "Maternal Health"[MeSH]
  OR maternal[tiab] OR perinatal[tiab] OR antenatal[tiab] OR prenatal[tiab]
  OR postnatal[tiab] OR postpartum[tiab])
AND
("Depression, Postpartum"[MeSH] OR "Depressive Disorder"[MeSH]
  OR "Anxiety Disorders"[MeSH] OR "Mental Health"[MeSH]
  OR depression[tiab] OR anxiety[tiab] OR "mental health"[tiab]
  OR "psychological distress"[tiab])
AND
("Community Health Workers"[MeSH] OR "community health worker*"[tiab]
  OR "lay health worker*"[tiab] OR "lay counselor*"[tiab]
  OR "peer support*"[tiab] OR "task-shifting"[tiab] OR "task-sharing"[tiab]
  OR "non-specialist"[tiab] OR paraprofessional[tiab])
AND
("Developing Countries"[MeSH] OR "low-income"[tiab] OR "middle-income"[tiab]
  OR LMIC[tiab] OR "developing countr*"[tiab] OR "resource-limited"[tiab])

Filters: 2005-2026, English
```

**Web replication:** <https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/?term=...> (paste full query)

### OpenAlex

**Date searched:** 2026-03-02
**Results:** 341

```
Search query: "community health worker" AND "maternal depression" AND "low-income"
Filters: from_publication_date=2005-01-01, type=article
Fields of study: Public Health, Psychiatry, Global Health
```

### Semantic Scholar

**Date searched:** 2026-03-02
**Results:** 198

```
Search query: community health worker maternal mental health depression
  low middle income countries intervention
Year range: 2005-2026
Fields of study: Medicine, Psychology
```

**Note:** Semantic Scholar data is licensed CC BY-NC [@singla2017psychological].

### Europe PMC

**Date searched:** 2026-03-02
**Results:** 156

```
(TITLE_ABS:"community health worker" OR TITLE_ABS:"lay health worker"
  OR TITLE_ABS:"task-shifting")
AND (TITLE_ABS:"maternal depression" OR TITLE_ABS:"perinatal depression"
  OR TITLE_ABS:"postnatal depression" OR TITLE_ABS:"maternal mental health")
AND (TITLE_ABS:"low-income" OR TITLE_ABS:"middle-income"
  OR TITLE_ABS:"developing countries")

Filter: PUB_YEAR:[2005 TO 2026]
```

### CrossRef

**Date searched:** 2026-03-02
**Results:** 65

```
Query: community health worker maternal depression LMIC intervention
Filter: from-pub-date=2005, type=journal-article
```

## Summary of Search Results

| Database | Date Searched | Records Found |
|----------|--------------|---------------|
| PubMed/MEDLINE | 2026-03-02 | 487 |
| OpenAlex | 2026-03-02 | 341 |
| Semantic Scholar | 2026-03-02 | 198 |
| Europe PMC | 2026-03-02 | 156 |
| CrossRef | 2026-03-02 | 65 |
| **Total** | | **1,247** |
| **After deduplication** | | **935** |

## Limits and Filters Applied

- **Date range:** January 2005 – March 2026
- **Language:** English
- **Publication types:** Peer-reviewed journal articles, randomized controlled trials, quasi-experimental studies, cluster-randomized trials
- **Excluded:** Conference abstracts only, editorials, commentaries, protocol-only papers (without results)

## Grey Literature Sources

| Source | Strategy | Date Searched | Results |
|--------|----------|--------------|---------|
| WHO publications | Manual search for CHW + mental health guidelines | 2026-03-03 | 3 |
| Reference lists | Backward citation search of included studies | 2026-03-05 | 7 |

---

*This search strategy was developed with assistance from the Research Workflow Assistant (`@systematic-reviewer` agent). All search decisions were made by the human researcher. Searches are reproducible via the web interfaces listed above.*
